title: Trimmed Tools
description: Allows you to trim your tools and weapons with over 30 trim materials and colors!
body:
# Trimmed Tools
This data pack allows you to apply trims to your tools and weapons, including the 10 in Vanilla **and** 20+ in More Trim Colors!

_**Note:** The pattern applied to your tools will be the same no matter what trim template you use. Minecraft's trim system does not yet allow for different item models based on the trim template._

<details>
<summary>All Tools That Can Be Trimmed</summary>

- ![Wooden Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8c567e5d025b9399ec1f879f77b8c46032fe282.png) Wooden Tools & Weapons
- ![Stone Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaa69a1a1ea82b334a4c434896f738d496558793.png) Stone Tools & Weapons
- ![Iron Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c6ad531956df4497c0707f034177495b8e85e39.png) Iron Tools & Weapons
- ![Golden Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b318e6f05ed67d06086a6603b46caa2707b3967.png) Golden Tools & Weapons
- ![Diamond Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8f50f971086a4ca2e32d009ccf4e58a91b1b9bf.png) Diamond Tools & Weapons
- ![Netherite Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34e051d990696699379ee3d288d0483047001491.png) Netherite Tools & Weapons
- ...more coming soon!

</details>
<details>
<summary>Compatible Packs</summary>

### - [More Trim Colors](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-trim-colors)
 - Adds **20+** trim materials and color palettes to choose from!

</details>
